steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage says Gogol must “tip his head back in order to see” the kite flying high in the sky. This describes a physical movement of the head—specifically, tilting or leaning it backward to look up.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Lean” directly expresses tilting or inclining the head backward. The other three choices—”create,” “pay,” and “teach”—describe unrelated concepts that don't fit a physical head movement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
